caption_style: WAYS creator captions; zero non-caption text

shots.caption: Tardigrades can pause their bodies
shots.visual: microscope tardigrade close-up, cute but real

shots.voiceover: When things get too dry, they curl into a tiny tun.
shots.caption: too dry / tiny tun
shots.visual: curling body shape or before-after microscope proxy

shots.voiceover: Their metabolism drops so low it is almost like waiting on pause.
shots.caption: metabolism drops / like pause
shots.visual: stillness with subtle heartbeat/motion graphic, no text

shots.voiceover: Then when water comes back, some can wake up again.
shots.caption: water returns / they wake up

shots.voiceover: It is one of nature's strangest survival tricks.
shots.caption: nature's strangest / survival trick
